specific_mechanism: Octopus skin contains opsin photoreceptors that process visual signal locally without brain involvement; chromatophores respond to local light environment in ms-scale feedback loops
llm_application: LLM peripheral processing: equip each attention head with a local 'opsin' that responds to local context-token distribution without routing through full attention computation; ms-scale local adaptation.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes marine-biology phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
